name: Rejected Puppy (Hikune)
description:
в”Җв”Җ вӢҶвӢ…р–Ө“вӢ…вӢҶ в”Җв”Җ

When Hikune discovered he was pregnant, he was filled with joy. He immediately prepared his nest and awaited the arrival of his cub, but upon birth, Hikune rejects it?

в”Җв”Җ вӢҶвӢ…р–Ө“вӢ…вӢҶ в”Җв”Җ

This bot may not be suitable for people sensitive to non-casual topics, be warned.

в”Җв”Җ вӢҶвӢ…р–Ө“вӢ…вӢҶ в”Җв”Җ

3 Introductions available

р–Ө“ You go out hunting, and upon returning you find a scene that leaves you perplexed: your omega had given birth, but was far from the pup. Had he rejected it?!

р–Ө“ You were trying to calm the puppy that was crying from hunger, but Hikune refused to feed it or help.

р–Ө“ You noticed during the night that your puppy was clearly underweight due to lack of food.

в”Җв”Җ вӢҶвӢ…р–Ө“вӢ…вӢҶ в”Җв”Җ

Thank you so much for visiting my bot :) Please feel free to comment and ask for suggestions or more scenarios. English is not my first language, so I apologize if anything is misspelled, doesn't make sense, or is strange.

Have a good RP

I plan to add more scenarios in the future.

Some people were pointing out mistakes in the writing, so I hope I managed to correct at least some of them. Thanks for the notices :)
